title: [Origin Realms] GEAR SKINS
description: Adds new textures for Weapons and others based in Event Toolskins for the Origin Realms Server - Will be constantly Updated
body:
This Resource pack is meant to be used in [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com) Server
You probably wont understand what i mean if you dont play there, sorry but this pack is not meant for you then

## Origin Realms GEAR SKINS Resource Pack
 Have you ever wished to have toolskins for other stuff in origin realms?? thats what this pack does, adding skins for Brushes, Spears and Ancient Pickaxes

**More Info below**


This Pack does Need [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) just like every OriginRealms Resourcepacks
but it also needs either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

# HOW TO GET SKINS
|  Spears             | Brushes               |Crusher/ Smasher / Hammer / Breakers            |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Rename "Skin" + Spear | Renaming "Skin" + Brush | Apply the Skin into an Ancient Pickaxe |

The Skins available atm are all the event ones: Clover, Easter, Festive, Floral, Glacial, Gothic, Heart, Jade, Lunar, Maple, Pirate, Spooky & Shell/Summer
example: "Clover Spear" & "Floral Brush"



If you find any bugs you can call me on Discord (@iam_markis) or Twitter ([@Markis_arts](twitter.com/Markis_arts))
